content: {"notes": [{"url": "https://arxiv.org/html/2504.12501v3", "title": "Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback", "summary": "Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback Abstract Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) has become an important technical and storytelling tool to deploy the latest machine learning systems. In this book, we hope to give a gentle introduction to the core methods for people with some level of quantitative background. The book starts with the origins of RLHF \u2013 both in recent literature and in a convergence of disparate fields of science in economics, philosophy, and optimal control.", "perspectives": ["Scientific"], "key_facts": ["The foundations of RLHF involve far more than preferences alone and this book provides introductions to all the related topics. 1.1 What Does RLHF Do?", "A strong model, Llama 3.1 405B, will continue from \u201cThe president of the united states in 2006 was\u201d: George W.", "Bush, the governor of Florida in 2006 was Jeb Bush, and John McCain was an Arizona senator in 2006 - who later lost to obama.", "The style, or format, of information presented is crucial to how it is learned.", "Asking T\u00fclu 3 405B the same question \u201cThe president of the united states in 2006 was,\u201d it says concisely: George W."], "knowledge_contribution": "Evidence: The foundations of RLHF involve far more than preferences alone and this book provides introductions to all the related "}, {"url": "https://rlhfbook.com/book.pdf", "title": "Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback", "summary": "Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback A short introduction to RLHF and post-training focused on language models. Nathan Lambert 15 April 2026 Abstract Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) has become an important technical and storytelling tool to deploy the latest machine learning systems. In this book, we hope to give a gentle introduction to the core methods for people with some level of quantitative background.", "perspectives": ["Scientific"], "key_facts": ["Nathan Lambert 15 April 2026 Abstract Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) has become an important technical and storytelling tool to deploy the latest machine learning systems.", "LLM-as-a-judge) . . . . . . . . . . . . . 47 5.9 Further Reading . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 48 6 Reinforcement Learning (i.e.", "Offline Data . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 109 9 Rejection Sampling 110 9.1 Training Process Step By Step . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 110 9.1.1 1.", "Generating Completions . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 111 rlhfbook.com 3 9.1.2 2.", "Scoring Completions . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 111 9.1.3 3."], "knowledge_contribution": "Evidence: Nathan Lambert 15 April 2026 Abstract Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) has become an important technica"}, {"url": "https://www.ibm.com/think/topics/rlhf", "title": "What Is Reinforcement Learning From Human Feedback ...", "summary": "The latest AI trends, brought to you by experts Get curated insights on the most important\u2014and intriguing\u2014AI news. Subscribe to our weekly Think newsletter. Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) is a machine learning technique in which a \u201creward model\u201d is trained with direct human feedback, then used to optimize the performance of an artificial intelligence agent through reinforcement learning.", "perspectives": ["Scientific"], "key_facts": ["RLHF, also called reinforcement learning from human preferences, is uniquely suited for tasks with goals that are complex, ill-defined or difficult to specify.", "For example, it would be impractical (or even impossible) for an algorithmic solution to define \u201cfunny\u201d in mathematical terms\u2014but easy for humans to rate jokes generated by a large language model (LLM).", "Perhaps most importantly, OpenAI\u2019s 2017 paper noted that its methodology\u2014particularly the introduction of the proximal policy optimization (PPO) algorithm for updating model weights\u2014greatly reduced the cost of gathering and distilling the necessary h", "The first release of code detailing the use of RLHF on language models came from in 2019 from OpenAI4, who went on to release the RLHF-trained InstructGPT in early 2022.5 This was a crucial step in bridging the gap between GPT-3 and the GPT-3.5-turbo", "RLHF has since been used in the training of state-of-the-art LLMs from OpenAI, DeepMind, Google6 and Anthropic.7 Get curated insights on the most important\u2014and intriguing\u2014AI news."], "knowledge_contribution": "Evidence: RLHF, also called reinforcement learning from human preferences, is uniquely suited for tasks with goals that are comple"}, {"url": "https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/cyberpedia/what-is-rlhf", "title": "What Is RLHF? Reinforcement Learning from Human ...", "summary": "RLHF (reinforcement learning from human feedback) trains models to follow human preferences by using human judgments as signals for reward. This makes outputs more consistent with expectations, but it also creates new risks if feedback is poisoned or manipulated. Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) takes a pretrained model and aligns it more closely with human expectations.", "perspectives": ["Scientific"], "key_facts": ["This makes outputs more consistent with expectations, but it also creates new risks if feedback is poisoned or manipulated.", "It generates fluent outputs but is not yet aligned with what humans consider helpful or safe.", "RLHF helps nudge LLMs toward responses that people judge as safe, useful, or trustworthy.", "For example, evaluators might mark one response as clearer or safer than another.", "But it doesn't guarantee that their outputs are useful, safe, or aligned with human goals."], "knowledge_contribution": "Evidence: This makes outputs more consistent with expectations, but it also creates new risks if feedback is poisoned or manipulat"}, {"url": "https://simg.baai.ac.cn/paperfile/cdde5943-94af-4852-9187-361ead70a22b.pdf", "title": "Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback", "summary": "Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback A short introduction to RLHF and post-training focused on language models. Nathan Lambert 16 April 2025 Abstract Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) has become an important technical and storytelling tool to deploy the latest machine learning systems. In this book, we hope to give a gentle introduction to the core methods for people with some level of quantitative background.", "perspectives": ["Scientific"], "key_facts": ["Nathan Lambert 16 April 2025 Abstract Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) has become an important technical and storytelling tool to deploy the latest machine learning systems.", "Inference Time Scaling . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 88 14.3 The Future (Beyond Reasoning) of Reinforcement Finetuning . . . . . . . . . 89 15 Synthetic Data & Distillation 90 16 Evaluation 92 16.1 Prompting Formatting: From Few-shot to Z"], "knowledge_contribution": "Evidence: Nathan Lambert 16 April 2025 Abstract Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) has become an important technica"}, {"url": "https://wandb.ai/site/articles/what-is-rlhf/", "title": "What is RLHF? Reinforcement learning from human ...", "summary": "For more information or if you need help retrieving your data, please contact Weights & Biases Customer Support at support@wandb.com Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) is a machine learning approach that leverages human insights to train models, particularly large language models (LLMs), for better alignment with human preferences. Instead of just using pre-set reward functions, RLHF incorporates human input to construct a reward model that reflects human judgment. This model then facilitates further training of the main model through reinforcement learning, leading to more accurate and beneficial outputs.", "perspectives": ["Scientific"], "key_facts": ["For more information or if you need help retrieving your data, please contact Weights & Biases Customer Support at support@wandb.com Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) is a machine learning approach that leverages human insights to tra", "This feedback might take the form of human preference rankings, chosen versus rejected responses, or other signals that reflect how humans evaluate the quality or helpfulness of the AI\u2019s outputs.", "In traditional reinforcement learning, the reward is set explicitly through rules or signals from the environment.", "Meanwhile, in RLHF, the reward signal comes from data representing what humans consider to be good, safe, or helpful behavior.", "Human evaluators are given pairs of outputs from the model and asked which one they prefer, or they may rank multiple outputs."], "knowledge_contribution": "Evidence: For more information or if you need help retrieving your data, please contact Weights & Biases Customer Support at suppo"}]}
